case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. YURITY KAGAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KAGAN, YURITY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-26-2018
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62791895) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION RE: CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 62791895) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62791895) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100035273) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100035837), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED JUL-16-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KAGAN, YURITY

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $193.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 62791895) AS TO DEFENDANT KAGAN, YURITY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAGAN, YURITY $4,281.44 PRINCIPAL, $193.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,475.39, SEE SCANNED DOC
